sentences.target: Je protège mon visage du soleil.

translations.fr: Je protège mon visage du soleil.
translations.en: I protect my face from the sun.
translations.de: Ich schütze mein Gesicht vor der Sonne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我保护我的脸不被太阳晒伤。
translations.yue: 我保護我個面免受陽光傷害。
translations.ru: Я защищаю своё лицо от солнца.
translations.pt: Eu protejo meu rosto do sol.
translations.vi: Tôi bảo vệ khuôn mặt của mình khỏi ánh nắng.
translations.nl: Ik bescherm mijn gezicht tegen de zon.
translations.uk: Я захищаю своє обличчя від сонця.
translations.hi: मैं अपने चेहरे को धूप से बचाता हूँ.
translations.el: Προστατεύω το πρόσωπό μου από τον ήλιο.
translations.nb: Jeg beskytter ansiktet mitt mot sola.
translations.id: Saya melindungi wajah saya dari matahari.
translations.sv: Jag skyddar mitt ansikte från solen.
translations.da: Jeg beskytter mit ansigt mod solen.
translations.ja: 私は顔を日差しから守ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular), subject of the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and a de-marked complement.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), agrees with a masculine singular noun.
Common noun (masculine singular), direct object of the verb.
Contraction of de + le, preposition introducing a complement of source/avoidance.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Nous protégeons la plante du froid.

translations.fr: Nous protégeons la plante du froid.
translations.en: We protect the plant from the cold.
translations.de: Wir schützen die Pflanze vor der Kälte.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们保护这株植物免受寒冷。
translations.yue: 我哋保護嗰棵植物免受寒冷。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bảo vệ cây khỏi cái lạnh.
translations.nl: We beschermen de plant tegen de kou.
translations.hi: हम पौधे को ठंड से बचाते हैं.
translations.el: Προστατεύουμε το φυτό από το κρύο.
translations.ja: 私たちは植物を寒さから守ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person plural), subject of the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article determiner (feminine singular), modifies the noun.
Common noun (feminine singular), direct object of the verb.
Contraction of de + le, preposition introducing a complement of source.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Tu veux protéger tes données en ligne.
sentences.reading: /ty vø pʁo.te.ʒe te dɔ.ne ɑ̃ liɲ/

translations.fr: Tu veux protéger tes données en ligne.
translations.ipa: /ty vø pʁo.te.ʒe te dɔ.ne ɑ̃ liɲ/
translations.en: You want to protect your data online.
translations.es: Quieres proteger tus datos en línea.
translations.de: Du willst deine Daten online schützen.
translations.it: Vuoi proteggere i tuoi dati online.
translations.zh-Hans: 你想在网上保护你的数据。
translations.yue: 你想在網上保護你的資料。
translations.ru: Ты хочешь защитить свои данные в интернете.
translations.pt: Você quer proteger seus dados online.
translations.he: אתה רוצה להגן על הנתונים שלך באינטרנט.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn bảo vệ dữ liệu của mình trực tuyến.
translations.ar: أنت تريد حماية بياناتك عبر الإنترنت.
translations.nl: Je wilt je gegevens online beschermen.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш захистити свої дані в інтернеті.
translations.hi: तुम अपने डेटा को ऑनलाइन सुरक्षित रखना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Chcesz chronić swoje dane w internecie.
translations.el: Θέλεις να προστατεύσεις τα δεδομένα σου στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Du vil beskytte dataene dine på nett.
translations.id: Kamu ingin melindungi data kamu secara online.
translations.sv: Du vill skydda dina uppgifter online.
translations.ro: Vrei să îți protejezi datele online.
translations.cs: Chceš si chránit svá data online.
translations.da: Du vil beskytte dine data online.
translations.ja: あなたはオンラインで自分のデータを守りたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular), subject of the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb, complement of 'veux'; governs a direct object and a prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), plural, modifies the noun.
Common noun (feminine plural), direct object of the infinitive.
Preposition; with 'ligne' forms the fixed expression 'en ligne' functioning adverbially ('online').
Common noun (feminine singular), head of the prepositional phrase 'en ligne' used adverbially.

sentences.target: Ils protègent le chiot sous la pluie.
sentences.reading: /il pʁɔ.tɛʒ lə ʃjo su la plɥi/

translations.fr: Ils protègent le chiot sous la pluie.
translations.ipa: /il pʁɔ.tɛʒ lə ʃjo su la plɥi/
translations.en: They protect the puppy in the rain.
translations.es: Ellos protegen al cachorro bajo la lluvia.
translations.de: Sie schützen den Welpen im Regen.
translations.it: Proteggono il cucciolo sotto la pioggia.
translations.yue: 佢哋喺雨中保護隻小狗。
translations.pt: Eles protegem o filhote de cachorro na chuva.
translations.vi: Họ bảo vệ con chó con dưới mưa.
translations.nl: Ze beschermen de pup in de regen.
translations.hi: वे बारिश में पिल्ले को बचाते हैं.
translations.id: Mereka melindungi anak anjing saat hujan.
translations.ja: 彼らは雨の中で子犬を守ります。
